query:
ALTER TABLE `group_schedules` 
ADD CONSTRAINT `fk_group_schedules_group` 
FOREIGN KEY (`group_id`) REFERENCES `groups`(`id`) 
ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE;
